articles.title: A Look At Shenzhou International Group Holdings (SEHK:2313) Valuation After Buyback And Dividend Announcement
articles.summary: Shenzhou International Group Holdings (SEHK:2313) has kicked off a sizeable share repurchase program alongside its latest earnings and dividend announcement, putting capital returns firmly in focus for anyone tracking the stock. See our latest analysis for Shenzhou International Group Holdings. Even with the buyback and dividend news, Shenzhou International’s 30 day share price return of 23.14% and 1 year total shareholder return of 19.51% decline point to pressure that has not yet reversed...
